title: Slack integration not taking - why?

posts.author: freshchris (Chris Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey dear ones!

When I try to make slack work, I get this message—that dot is where I’d assume that the “item” would be…well, the item on the boad, but that dot shows up and nothing else.

Seems expected behavior wouild be an item list. Not working.

How can we fix?
